entities.name: Audit Committee Investigation - Nexplanon Wholesaler Sales Practices
entities.context: Audit Committee investigation ... two United States wholesalers being asked to purchase inventory in excess of current customer demand for Nexplanon ... former Chief Executive Officer ... engaged in inappropriate business conduct

entities.name: Prior Disclosures Re Nexplanon Wholesaler Sales Practices Should Not Be Relied Upon

attributes.note: 10-K/A and 10-Q/A amendments filed; no restatement of financial statements per company

entities.context: certain of our prior disclosures relating to these sales practices for wholesalers ... were inaccurate or incomplete. As a result, we filed the Amendments. ... We have determined that there will be no restatement or revision to our previously issued financial statements

entities.name: Tariff and Trade Policy Risk
entities.context: trade protection measures and import or export licensing requirements, including the direct and indirect impacts of tariffs (including pharmaceutical sector tariffs)

entities.name: Audit Committee Investigation Uncertainty Risk
entities.context: uncertainties surrounding the Audit Committee investigation described in our Current Report on Form 8-K

entities.name: CEO Succession / Leadership Change Risk
entities.context: the risk that appointing a new Chief Executive Officer may take longer than anticipated

entities.name: Material Weakness Remediation Risk
entities.context: our ability to remediate the material weaknesses in internal control over financial reporting and the related costs

entities.name: Nexplanon Loss of Exclusivity 2027 Risk
entities.context: any failure by us to retain market exclusivity for Nexplanon or to obtain an additional period of exclusivity in the United States for Nexplanon subsequent to the expiration of the rod patents in 2027

entities.name: Atozet LOE Continuing Impact Risk
entities.context: the continued impact of the September 2024 loss of exclusivity (LOE) for Atozet (ezetimibe and atorvastatin)

entities.name: Credit Rating / Capital Markets Access Risk
entities.context: actions that may be taken by credit rating agencies that could negatively affect either our access to or terms of financing

entities.name: Drug Pricing / MFN Pricing Pressure Risk
entities.context: International reference pricing, including Most-Favored-Nation drug pricing, and other pricing-related initiatives

entities.name: Goodwill Impairment Risk - Reporting Units
entities.context: fair value of either the U.S. or International reporting unit falling below its carrying amount ... non-cash impairment charge

attributes.transaction: divestiture of Jada System to Laborie Medical Technologies

entities.context: definitive agreement to divest the Jada System to Laborie Medical Technologies Corporation for an upfront payment of up to $465 million ... expected to close in early 2026, subject to regulatory approvals
